name: tpl-resume-screening
description: HR Resume Screening Pipeline — screen resume against JD, run background check, draft offer or reject. Replace externalUrl with your background check provider (e.g. Checkr: https://api.checkr.com/v1/candidates).

steps.prompt: Draft a warm, professional offer letter for {{candidate_name}} for the {{role_title}} position. Compensation range: {{compensation_range}}. Reference their key strengths from the screening: {{steps.screen-resume.output.strengths}}. The letter should be enthusiastic but precise. Include: offer summary, role description, compensation, next steps.

steps.notifyMsg: Resume screening result for {{candidate_name}} ({{role_title}}): score {{steps.screen-resume.output.score}}/10 — below threshold. Gaps: {{steps.screen-resume.output.gaps}}. No further action.
Background check returned non-clear status for {{candidate_name}} ({{role_title}}). Status: {{steps.trigger-bgcheck.output.status}}. Candidate placed on hold — manual review required.
